center.name: 帕拉尼
center.summary: 帕拉尼是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Nilgiri pipit，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Museum specimens exist from the Palani ranges but habitat changes may have led to its reduction or extirpation as the species was not found in surveys in the 21st century.{{cite journal|title=Reassessment of the distribution and threat status of the Western Ghats endemic bird, Nilgiri Pipit Anthus nilghiriensis|journal=Current Science|volume=107|issue=4|pages=622–630 |year=2014 |url=http://www.currentscience.ac.in/Volumes/107/04/0622.pdf|author1=Robin, V.V
